controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Can Fan RVK, Phresh TEK Inline, Vortex S-Line, window AC unit
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling outlet controls AC exhaust fan or air conditioning unit based on temperature setpoint. APCL4X/APCL8X power expanders available for high-amp devices. 120V NEMA—transformer needed for 230V European use. Three-display unit shows temp, RH, and CO2 PPM simultaneously.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC Infinity CLOUDLINE T4, Systemair RVK EC, Vents 125EC
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via cooling outlet. No 0-10V or PWM speed control signal. EC fan speed fixed at its own controller setting; APE4200 only cuts or restores power.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Dr. Infrared DR-988, greenhouse tube heater
compatible_devices.notes: Heating outlet activates when temperature falls below setpoint. Data logger records min/max temperature.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)
compatible_devices.notes: Shared Humidify/Dehumidify outlet in humidification mode. Data logger records min/max humidity alongside CO2 PPM.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)
compatible_devices.notes: Shared Humidify/Dehumidify outlet in dehumidification mode. Cannot simultaneously run humidifier and dehumidifier.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CAP PPM-2, Blueprint BPCO2G-2, Titan Controls Ares 8
compatible_devices.notes: Dedicated CO2 PPM outlet with built-in low-drift dual-beam CO2 sensor in remote probe—true closed-loop PPM control. Optional high-temp emergency shutdown: if exhaust fails, CO2 generator cuts off until temperature drops 10°F. Real-time CO2 PPM displayed on third screen. Data logger records min/max CO2. APCL4X/APCL8X power expanders available for high-amp generators.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F90 Master Environmental Controller (APE4200)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 solenoid valve + regulator assembly, compressed CO2 tank system
compatible_devices.notes: Same dedicated CO2 PPM outlet with dual-beam CO2 sensor; triggers solenoid valve on compressed CO2 tank systems. Closed-loop PPM control makes this the most precise CO2 delivery option across all four Autopilot environmental controller models.
